---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload file '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste the relevant log output.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 24.18.0]
- Browser (if frontend issue): [e.g. Chrome 126]
- Network: [testnet / mainnet]

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
